label: WB & Ozon — Russian E-commerce
description: Wildberries and Ozon — largest Russian e-commerce platforms. Product catalog with filters, listing pages, product cards with reviews/ratings, cart, checkout. RU locale. Heavy JS SPAs.
source_patterns: Search with RU-language query: type query (Cyrillic) → wait 1-3s for suggestions → select or submit
Filter by category/price/brand: click filter panel → select options → apply → wait 2-4s for re-render
Product grid scroll (infinite on WB, paginated on Ozon): 200-500px per pass, 1.5-3s pause
Product detail (images, description, reviews, delivery info): open → deep scroll through tabs
Add to cart: select size/qty → add → confirm toast/modal
Checkout flow: cart review → delivery address → payment → confirm order
Login via phone/SMS or social: enter phone (with country code) → wait SMS → enter code → submit

active_hours.description: RU shopping — peaks morning (8-10), lunch (12-14), evening (18-22)

scroll.description: Product grid — moderate passes, product detail — deep. Browsing-focused, checkout forms slower.

mouse.description: Moderate, browsing speed — product comparison and checkout

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate to search → type RU query → apply filters → scroll grid (3-5 passes) → open product → scroll details/reviews → add to cart → login with phone+SMS → checkout
